headline: 3 Reasons to Sell WST and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small loss of 2.7% while holding steady at $248.28. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 3.1% gain during that period.

headline: Oil Crashes 10%, Stocks Rebound On Trump End-Of-War Signals: What's Moving Markets Tuesday?
summary: U.S. stocks rose broadly on Tuesday as crude oil plunges over 10% on Trump's Iran end-of-war signals. Traders also await Oracle's earnings.
